creator: freebsd@grem.de
text:
On 9.6.12 01:43, makc@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: editors/leo: make install misses cleo icons
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: makc
> State-Changed-When: Fri Jun 8 23:43:07 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> The port has no maintainer. Could you make a patch to fix the problem
> and maybe take maintainership if you are using the port?
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168437
> 

Hi Max,

I produced the patch below based on the version I reported. When I tried
to apply it, I realized that someone else already changed in (in a
slightly different way) a week after I filed the PR (three days ago).
Unfortunately the PR hasn't been altered.

Signature of the change was:

# $FreeBSD: ports/editors/leo/Makefile,v 1.34 2012/06/05 20:54:01 sylvio
Exp $

I still attached my patch, as it also fixes some complaints portlint had
(I didn't test them though, just following portlints recommendations).

So in general I would consider this PR closed.

Since I'm not sure if I'll actually keep using leo I don't feel
qualified to take maintainership at this point.

--
Michael
